description: Notebook of contributions received – February 1941-December 1941 – Museum of Islamic Art – (number 253) – in Arabic. (information from Ḥassanein Muḥammad Rabīʿa, ed., Dalīl Wathā'iq al-Janīza al-Jadīda / Catalogue of the Documents of the New Geniza, 75). MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בENL.
